ogTitle: Agnes Water vs Airdmillan: Climate Safety

heading: Agnes Water vs Airdmillan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Agnes Water, Queensland and Airdmillan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Airdmillan has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Agnes Water (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Agnes Water or Airdmillan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Agnes Water has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Airdmillan scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Agnes Water scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Airdmillan scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Agnes Water or Airdmillan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Airdmillan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
